mapper.sql: select c.id, c.contract_no, c.contract_name, c.customer_id, cu.customer_name, c.opportunity_id, c.contract_amount, c.status_id, s.status_name, s.status_code, c.sign_date, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.content, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_time, wi.id as workflow_instance_id from crm_contract c left join crm_customer cu on c.customer_id = cu.id left join crm_contract_status s on c.status_id = s.id left join crm_workflow_instance wi on wi.business_id = c.id and wi.status = '0'
mapper.select: select id from crm_contract_status where status_code = #{statusCode}
mapper.insert:
select seq_crm_contract.nextval as id from DUAL
insert into crm_contract ( id, contract_no, contract_name, customer_id, opportunity_id, contract_amount, status_id, sign_date, start_date, end_date, content, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{id}, #{contractNo}, #{contractName}, #{customerId}, #{opportunityId}, #{contractAmount}, #{statusId}, #{signDate}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{content}, #{createBy}, sysdate )
mapper.update: update crm_contract set status_id = #{statusId}, update_time = sysdate where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from crm_contract where id in #{id}
